Operation 'extractFileData' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Extract file data' is too generic and doesn't convey the asynchronous nature or job-based workflow. Description lacks clarity about return value (job ID) and how to retrieve results. Added domain context about supported document types, clarified asynchronous processing model, and explained the workflow for AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation in conjunction with getJobResult.

data.current_description: Processes documents and returns a job ID for tracking the extraction progress. You can specify exactly what data fields you need, provide custom instructions, and choose from multiple upload methods (base64 or multipart form data).
data.summary_suggestion: Submit document for structured data extraction
data.description_suggestion: Submits a document (PDF, image, spreadsheet, or text) for asynchronous structured data extraction. Specify required data fields, provide custom extraction instructions, and choose upload method (base64-encoded or multipart form data). Returns a job ID for tracking extraction progress. The extraction is processed asynchronously; use the job ID with the getJobResult endpoint to retrieve extracted data once processing completes.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Extract file data' is too generic and doesn't convey the asynchronous nature or job-based workflow. Description lacks clarity about return value (job ID) and how to retrieve results. Added domain context about supported document types, clarified asynchronous processing model, and explained the workflow for AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation in conjunction with getJobResult.

message: Operation 'getJobResult' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too vague and doesn't indicate status checking capability. Description lacks specificity about required input (job ID parameter) and what the response contains (status values, extracted data structure, error information). Enhanced to clarify the polling pattern, parameter requirements, and response structure for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieves the results of a data extraction job. Poll this endpoint to check the processing status and retrieve the extracted data once complete.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve extraction job results and status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the results and current status of a data extraction job. Accepts a job ID parameter (obtained from extractFileData operation). Returns the extraction status (pending, completed, or failed), extracted structured data when available, and any error details if processing failed. Supports polling to monitor job progress until completion.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too vague and doesn't indicate status checking capability. Description lacks specificity about required input (job ID parameter) and what the response contains (status values, extracted data structure, error information). Enhanced to clarify the polling pattern, parameter requirements, and response structure for better AI agent interpretability.
